rcomplex 0.1.0
  • Reference

Leave-k-out jackknife stability for trait-exclusive cliques

Source: R/RcppExports.R
find_cliques_stability_cpp.Rd

For each combination of k species removed (k = 1..max_k), re-runs clique finding on remaining species and checks whether each trait-exclusive clique from the full analysis is preserved with matching gene assignment and trait.

find_cliques_stability_cpp(
  edge_hog,
  edge_g1,
  edge_g2,
  edge_sp1,
  edge_sp2,
  edge_qval,
  edge_eff,
  n_target_species,
  min_species,
  n_hogs,
  n_genes,
  species_trait,
  full_cliques,
  max_k = 3L,
  max_genes_per_sp = 10L,
  jaccard_threshold = 0.8,
  n_cores = 1L
)

Arguments

edge_hog

0-based HOG index per edge

edge_g1

0-based gene index for gene 1

edge_g2

0-based gene index for gene 2

edge_sp1

0-based species index for gene 1

edge_sp2

0-based species index for gene 2

edge_qval

q-value per edge

edge_eff

Effect size per edge

n_target_species

Number of target species

min_species

Minimum species for valid clique

n_hogs

Total HOGs

n_genes

Total genes

species_trait

Trait value per species (0, 1, 2, ... any discrete levels)

full_cliques

Output of find_cliques_cpp() on the full dataset

max_k

Maximum species to leave out (default 3)

max_genes_per_sp

Maximum genes per species per HOG (default 10)

jaccard_threshold

Threshold for matching cliques (default 0.8)

n_cores

OpenMP threads (default 1)

Value

List with stability, clique_disruption, stability_class, novel_cliques

Contents

Developed by Martin Paliocha.
